title: Per-Person Locator Bar Visibility
description: Let players choose to share their location on the locator bar!
body:
**Are you wanting to host a multiplayer world with the locator bar enabled but still want individual players to be able to not share their location with everyone at all times? Perhaps want a command to hide your individual location from other players or hide the bar from your screen only, entirely?**

---
**This simple and lightweight pack does both, featuring 3 new _non_-operator commands that work on install.**

---

</br>

<details>
<summary>/trigger togglelocation</summary>

This command will toggle your waypoint location from appearing on other's locator bars.

</details>

<details>
<summary>/trigger togglelocatorbar</summary>

This command will toggle the locator bar UI element on your screen incase you don't want it replacing your XP bar.

</details>

<details>
<summary>/trigger getsettings</summary>

This command messages you your current settings incase you forgot them and don't want to toggle them to find out.

</details>

</br>

To uninstall, use 
```
/function il:uninstall
```
 and then either disable the datapack via /datapack or remove the pack from the world's datapacks folder.

</br>

This pack relies on the locator_bar experiment but this pack will automatically enable the locator bar experiment if it isn't already applied.

<details>
<summary>Title Version?</summary>

The alternate title version just includes a snazzy [​PPL] watermark when sending server messages to the player to be more visually close to a plugin.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Triggered [command]</summary>

If you find this message appearing when using custom commands annoying, type 
```
/gamerule sendCommandFeedback false
```
 to disable it.

</details>
</br>

## Requires latest snapshot as of now (25w15a) to function.
